title: Buckhannon, WV Hours of Operation & Store Location
text:
Buckhannon, WV Hours of Operation & Store Location

Located in Buckhannon, WV, Middletown Tractor Sales is here to meet all your outdoor equipment needs! Whether you are a homeowner, landscaper, or township official, we have the John Deere, Ventrac, STIHL, and Honda Power equipment that you need to tackle your workload. Need service on your tractor, lawn mower, utility vehicle, or other equipment? We offer pickup and delivery to our on-site shop, have over one million dollars of parts inventory in stock, AND we offer mobile repair service -- getting rid of your downtime in no time. We are conveniently located near Weston, Clarksburg, Elkins, Flatwoods, and Glenville, WV. You can find us off route 33 behind Buckhannon Toyota.

When you need equipment, Make Your Main Factor...Middletown Tractor Sales.

Middletown Tractor Sales Buckhannon
136 Billingsley Dr
Buckhannon, WV 26201
Phone: (304) 473-4400

For current store hours, please call (304) 473-4400 or visit middletowntractor.com/map-directions--hours-buckhannon.

title: All Middletown Tractor Sales Locations
text:
Middletown Tractor Sales has four locations serving West Virginia and Pennsylvania:

1. Fairmont, WV - 2050 Boyers Drive, Fairmont, WV 26554. Phone: (304) 366-4690. Located just off I-79 Exit 133, Kingmont.

2. Buckhannon, WV - 136 Billingsley Dr, Buckhannon, WV 26201. Phone: (304) 473-4400. Located off Route 33 behind Buckhannon Toyota. Serves Weston, Clarksburg, Elkins, Flatwoods, and Glenville areas.

3. Uniontown, PA - 655 Pittsburgh Road, Uniontown, PA 15401. Phone: (724) 439-1234. Located just off PA-51/Pittsburgh Rd.

4. Washington, PA - 910 Henderson Avenue, Washington, PA 15301. Phone: (724) 229-0191. Located across from Lowry's Western Shop, near Waynesburg, Canonsburg, Pittsburgh PA, and Wheeling WV.

All locations carry John Deere, STIHL, and Honda Power equipment. Fairmont, Buckhannon, and Washington also carry Ventrac. Washington additionally carries Kuhn.
